feature.name: Schema validation core
feature.description: Extract Voluptuous Schema declaration, Required/Optional markers, composed validators, and error aggregation without original voluptuous import.
included_behaviors: declare Schema with Required and Optional markers
validate dict payloads with type and nested schema matching
compose All, Any, and In validators with Coerce
aggregate validation failures as MultipleInvalid with error paths
excluded_behaviors: Email, Url, File, and other heavyweight validators

entanglement.description: Voluptuous couples schema compilation, marker semantics, sub-validator composition, and Invalid path aggregation.
signals: Schema._compile builds callable validators from dict/list graphs
Required/Optional markers drive key presence and defaults

output.import: import featurelifted; from featurelifted import Schema, Required, Optional, All, Any, In, Coerce, Invalid, MultipleInvalid, SchemaError
